pending.body:
finding_summary: `milestone show`, `milestone status`, and `milestone plan` never validate `MilestoneSnapshot` semantics before using `status.json`, so they can present or act on impossible milestone states instead of rejecting corrupt state.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/cli/milestone.rs:447-467
- src/cli/milestone.rs:627-639
- src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:1466-1471
- src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs:208-225
remediation_hint: After loading the snapshot, call `MilestoneSnapshot::validate_semantics()` and surface a milestone-scoped error before rendering fields like `active_bead` or allowing replanning.

finding_summary: Pending requirements runs are accepted purely by `RequirementsStatus`; the handlers never verify that the referenced run is actually a milestone-mode / milestone-bundle run, so an unrelated draft/quick requirements run can be mistaken for milestone planning.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/cli/milestone.rs:167-174
- src/cli/milestone.rs:471-517
- src/cli/milestone.rs:709-750
remediation_hint: When loading a pending requirements run for either inspection or planning, require `run.mode == Milestone` and `run.output_kind == MilestoneBundle`; otherwise raise a milestone-scoped error and avoid telling the user to continue an incompatible run.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 7 -> Plan and Implement
